test:backend.notes: 168 passed, 7 errors. Errors are in test fixtures (admin_user_token) due to database password authentication failure - environment configuration issue, not code bug

lint:frontend.notes: Lint passed with warnings only (unused vars, img element, any types)

blockingIssues.description: Missing database migration: The router imports PhysicalService but there is no Alembic migration for the new physical_plans and physical_progress_logs tables. Running the API will fail with 'relation does not exist' errors.

Missing backend API endpoints: The frontend calls POST /documents/upload, DELETE /documents/{documentId}, GET /documents/medical/self-assessment, POST /documents/medical/self-assessment, POST /documents/reminders, GET /documents/reminders/me, DELETE /documents/reminders/{reminderId} - none of which exist in the backend router.
Missing database models: No models exist for MedicalSelfAssessment or Reminder entities. Even if endpoints were added, there would be no tables to store/query the data.
Stage enum mismatch: Frontend uses 'new_application'|'admit_card_released'|'dv_scheduled' but backend uses 'pst'|'pet'|'medical'|'document_verification'. Stage filtering will not work correctly.

Streak calculation bug in update_streak_on_activity: When user completes a mission on a consecutive day, the code sets current_streak to '1 + bonus_points + ...' instead of incrementing from existing value. For example, if current_streak=5 and bonus_points=2, the streak becomes 6 instead of 8.

Streak freeze endpoint response model mismatch: POST /streaks/freeze declares response_model=StreakFreezeResponse but returns {"success": True, "message": "..."}. This will cause a Pydantic validation error at runtime.
Bug: UUID.uuid4() is incorrect usage. uuid4() is a function, not a class method. This will cause TypeError: 'UUID' object is not callable at runtime.
Medical guidelines CRUD returns hardcoded static data with placeholder UUID 44444444-... instead of real database operations.
Announcements CRUD is completely fake: admin_get_announcements() returns empty list, admin_create_announcement() uses placeholder UUID 55555555-...
broadcast_announcement() method is not implemented - only contains pass. Announcements are never broadcast to users.
Document compliance stats return hardcoded placeholder data (60.0%, 50.0%, etc.) instead of real database calculations.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit requirement that workers must verify backend endpoints exist before implementing frontend API calls. Frontend-backend contract should be established upfront or both should be implemented together.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: document-readiness-module: frontend calls 7 endpoints that don't exist

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that database migrations are REQUIRED for any new tables, not optional. Workers should run 'alembic revision --autogenerate' and 'alembic upgrade head' as part of verification, not just 'python3 -m py_compile'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: physical-training-module: no migration created for physical_plans and physical_progress_logs tables

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add enforcement that verification must include starting the actual service (uvicorn) to test API endpoints work, not just syntax checking with py_compile.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple features: workers only ran py_compile which doesn't verify runtime behavior

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce agent-browser UI verification as a hard requirement, not optional. Worker handoffs should show interactiveChecks were performed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: physical-training-module handoff shows empty interactiveChecks array

rejectedObservations.observation: Documents module should use Repository pattern
rejectedObservations.reason: While other modules use repositories, this is an architectural inconsistency that should be addressed separately as a refactoring task, not blocking user testing
